title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 292.080 - Explosives not to be placed near egress
text:
292.080.  Explosives not to be placed near egress. — No explosive or inflammable compound shall be used in any establishment in this state where labor is employed, in such place or manner as to obstruct or render hazardous the egress of operatives in case of fire.
(RSMo 1939 § 10189) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13229; 1919 § 6793; 1909 § 7834
